queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of lacking a checking account on credit risk mitigation and default probability reduction.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of the requested credit amount as a primary credit risk driver that increases default probability.
Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of loan duration in months and its statistical correlation with elevated credit risk exposure.
